nodes.label: 04-10 Clean-Build Strategy for Asset and Contract Modules: Staging Hygiene, Repo Control, and SimPro-Parity V1 Scope

decisions: Implement a clean-build strategy using a blank staging environment with new modules integrated as first-class additions.
Limit V1 scope to SimPro parity (assets, recurring contracts, and quotes for repairs).
Enforce strict module separation to prevent parallel logic and corruption of existing ledgers.
properties.summary: 04-10 Clean-Build Strategy for Asset and Contract Modules: Staging Hygiene, Repo Control, and SimPro-Parity V1 Scope

nodes.label: 04-10 Audit Readiness Amid Regulatory Shift: Evidence Consolidation and ‘Fit and Proper’ Risk

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-10 Audit Readiness Amid Regulatory Shift: Evidence Consolidation and ‘Fit and Proper’ Risk
decisions: Recognized the need to address the fragmentation of evidence across SharePoint, Confluence, and Fireflies.
Identified the emerging risk of "scope creep" regarding character/reputational assessments by agencies.
properties.summary: 04-10 Audit Readiness Amid Regulatory Shift: Evidence Consolidation and ‘Fit and Proper’ Risk

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-10 Marketing and Operations Strategy Session
decisions: Approved specific designs for lightboxes and brochures.
Clarified brand messaging for upcoming conferences.
Greenlit an experimental AI-driven approach to software development.
properties.summary: 04-10 Marketing and Operations Strategy Session

nodes.label: 04-10 QMS Audit and Document Review Meeting

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-10 QMS Audit and Document Review Meeting
decisions: All technicians' digital thermometers have been recalibrated to address previous audit findings.
A new record retention register has been implemented to replace the previous document control register.
properties.summary: 04-10 QMS Audit and Document Review Meeting

nodes.label: 04-10 AI-Driven Financial Model Pinpoints Chemical Sales as Key Profit Lever, Reshaping Business Strategy

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-10 AI-Driven Financial Model Pinpoints Chemical Sales as Key Profit Lever, Reshaping Business Strategy
decisions: Pivot strategic focus from capital sales/service revenue to high-margin chemical consumables.
Implement aggressive incentive structures for chemical sales and validations.
Adopt AI-driven scenario planning for real-time strategic decision-making.
properties.summary: 04-10 AI-Driven Financial Model Pinpoints Chemical Sales as Key Profit Lever, Reshaping Business Strategy

nodes.label: 04-10 Resolving GitHub Access Deadlock for Odoo.sh Integration

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-10 Resolving GitHub Access Deadlock for Odoo.sh Integration
decisions: Identified that Odoo.sh admin permissions are failing to propagate to the linked GitHub repository.
Recognized the need to address systemic issues regarding fragmented ownership and unclear access protocols.
properties.summary: 04-10 Resolving GitHub Access Deadlock for Odoo.sh Integration

nodes.label: 04-13 Diagnostic Consultation on Sales Team Restructuring and Growth Strategy

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-13 Diagnostic Consultation on Sales Team Restructuring and Growth Strategy
properties.summary: 04-13 Diagnostic Consultation on Sales Team Restructuring and Growth Strategy

nodes.label: 04-13 Overcoming Sales Stagnation Through a Disciplined, Structured Process

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-13 Overcoming Sales Stagnation Through a Disciplined, Structured Process
decisions: Transition from high-pressure tactics to a discovery-based, "win-win" sales philosophy.
Adoption of a structured, repeatable process for both existing customer requalification and new business acquisition.
Implementation of a sustainable feedback loop between sales, service, and procurement departments.
properties.summary: 04-13 Overcoming Sales Stagnation Through a Disciplined, Structured Process

nodes.label: 04-13 Strategizing Sales Growth Through Dynamic Incentives and Service-Led Sales

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-13 Strategizing Sales Growth Through Dynamic Incentives and Service-Led Sales
decisions: Transition from static, long-term incentives to regularly evolving structures to prevent entitlement and maintain focus.
Align incentive changes with shifting business priorities (e.g., shifting focus from tabs to cartons).
Ensure sales targets are designed to be perceived as achievable to drive engagement and effort.
properties.summary: 04-13 Strategizing Sales Growth Through Dynamic Incentives and Service-Led Sales

nodes.label: 04-13 Strategic Sales Process and Team Motivation Analysis

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-13 Strategic Sales Process and Team Motivation Analysis
decisions: Adopt a proactive, data-backed sales approach to provide rational validation to clients before emotional triggers occur.
Shift from a reactive sales posture to an information-driven model that controls decision timing.
properties.summary: 04-13 Strategic Sales Process and Team Motivation Analysis

nodes.label: 04-13 Fractional Sales Management Proposal and Implementation Strategy

properties.title: [Plaud-AutoFlow] 04-13 Fractional Sales Management Proposal and Implementation Strategy
decisions: Agreement on foundational relationship principles (transparency, mutual respect, and "5% conversations").
Adoption of a structured two-phase engagement model.
Approval of Phase 1 Diagnostic (4-day on-site, $7,000 investment).
properties.summary: 04-13 Fractional Sales Management Proposal and Implementation Strategy

decisions: To proceed with an aggressive quote utilizing a razor-thin 5% margin on "Duck 1" units
volume discount.
To structure the quote by showing the full list price before stating the discount
ensuring the client appears to achieve a significant "win."
The primary strategy is to sacrifice upfront hardware margin to secure the long-term
profitable chemistry and service agreement.
